subject: Roman Catholic Church of the Visitation, Pincehely, Hungary (exterior, 2025)
context_for_lesson: Pincehely is the village where Judy Abrams was hidden for safety in 1944 with her cousin Tevia. The Church of the Visitation is the village's main religious landmark and would have been a known feature of the village landscape during the period Judy lived there in hiding.
author: Pasztilla aka Attila Terbocs
license_summary: CC BY-SA 4.0 — free to use, share, and adapt with attribution; derivative works must use the same license
attribution_required: Photo: Pasztilla aka Attila Terbocs / Wikimedia Commons (CC BY-SA 4.0)
lesson_use_intent: Page showing Judy's hiding place in Pincehely village, OR map/journey segment from Budapest to Pincehely. Caption clearly states: 'Pincehely's Church of the Visitation today. Judy was hidden here as a child in 1944.'
concerns: None. License is explicit (CC BY-SA 4.0), source is Wikimedia Commons (the gold standard for licensed reuse), attribution requirements are satisfiable in the lesson PDF caption. Note: this is a 2025 photo, so the building has been renovated since 1944 — caption should clarify this is the church TODAY, not as Judy would have seen it.
